member.name: M:PowerKit.Extensions.EnvironmentExtensions.<G>$57DD63EC381B40E0D8049D1E01FA2D1C.RefreshEnvironmentVariables
member.summary: Refreshes the environment variables of the current process by re-applying the machine-level and user-level environment variables.
member.remarks: On Windows, this first removes any process-level environment variables that are not present at the machine or user scope, then applies the machine-level and user-level values to the current process. This can remove variables inherited from the parent process or set by the application itself. On other platforms, this method is a no-op.
